title: Agent SDK：把 Claude Code 的 agent loop 变成库
title_en: Agent SDK: Claude Code's Agent Loop as a Library

body.concept: Claude Agent SDK 把驱动 Claude Code 的同一套 agent loop、工具集和上下文管理打包成 Python/TypeScript 库。你调用 `query()` 传入 prompt 和选项，就能拿到一个异步流式迭代器——Claude 会自动读文件、跑命令、改代码，和在 Claude Code 里的行为完全一样。
body.analogy: Claude Code 是一辆组装好的汽车，你坐在驾驶座上操控。Agent SDK 则是同一套发动机、变速箱和轮子，以零件套装的形式出售——你把它们装进自己的底盘（你的应用），用代码控制方向盘。

body_en.concept: The Claude Agent SDK packages the same agent loop, tools, and context management that power Claude Code into a Python/TypeScript library. You call `query()` with a prompt and options, and get back a streaming async iterator of messages — Claude autonomously reads files, runs commands, edits code, and more, just like it does inside Claude Code.
body_en.analogy: Think of Claude Code as a fully assembled car you drive from the driver's seat. The Agent SDK is the same engine, transmission, and wheels sold as a crate kit — you bolt them into your own chassis (your application) and control the steering programmatically.

diagram:
flowchart LR
    A([Your App]) --> B[query prompt, options]
    B --> C[Agent Loop]
    C --> D[Read]
    D --> E[Think]
    E --> F[Edit]
    F --> G[Bash]
    G --> H[...]
    H --> C
    C -->|streamed messages| A
